reviews.comment:
No reciben VISA ni débito ni crédito de ninguna entidad. Sólo Cabal y Amex. La atención de playero lenta y pésima, pocas ganas de trabajar. Mi pareja entró al baño de hombres y estaba sucio. No recomiendo para nada esta estación, carguen combustible muuuucho antes, si es posible disminuyan velocidad para poder consumir menos... Lamentablemente para nosotros tuvimos que gastar el efectivo porque necesitábamos llegar al Aeropuerto de Córdoba cuanto antes, obviamente al regreso que fué ayer, NI A PALOS CARGÁBAMOS AQUI.

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept VISA, debit, or credit cards from any bank. Only Cabal and Amex. The attendant's service was slow and terrible; he seemed unwilling to work. My partner went into the men's restroom, and it was filthy. I absolutely do not recommend this station. Fill up way earlier, and if possible, slow down to save fuel. Unfortunately for us, we had to spend our cash because we needed to get to Córdoba Airport as soon as possible. Obviously, on our return trip yesterday, there was NO WAY we were filling up here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnLWZIUjhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar siempre lleno. Con hospedaje y variedad de ofertas en comida. Precios algo caros pero es uno de los pocos lugares con bufete variado en el camino. Baños impecables y la estación recibe tarjeta y efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
Always busy. Offers lodging and a variety of food options. Prices are a bit high, but it's one of the few places along the way with a varied buffet. Spotless restrooms, and the station accepts both credit and cash.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los empleados. Lp malo es que siempre se llena y no ponen más estacionamiento. Faltan más cajas registradoras. Baños limpios y modernos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. The only downside is that it's always full and they don't have more parking. They need more cash registers. The bathrooms are clean and modern.
